feat.name: Rend Mimicry
feat.prerequisite: *Wild Mimic Dedication*; you have seen a creature use *Rend* or have identified a creature that has Rend in combat
feat.requirement: You have hit the same enemy with two consecutive melee Strikes that each dealt slashing damage.
feat.text: Taking advantage of the brutal efficiency of hacking away at a target with two slashing attacks, you've mastered the art of punishing a foe caught between your slices. You deal 1d6 slashing damage to the target. This damage increases to 2d6 at 10th level and to 3d6 at 16th level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
